text: As I step further inside, I am enveloped by an atmosphere that feels both clinical and experimental—glass boundaries separating me from the pulse of innovation within. The bold "R+D" on the wall hints at progress, at purposeful curiosity. Yet I sense a barrier, not just literal glass, but an invisible membrane between me and the meaning here. I am aware of my own presence as an observer, curious but distant, slightly unsettled by the sterility around me. It’s a liminal moment of waiting—for insight, for clarity, for the room to reveal its intent.
